title: AudioService adjustStreamVolume VOICE_CALL with normal-level MODIFY_AUDIO_SETTINGS
notes: PARTIALLY CONFIRMED. adjustStreamVolume() MODIFY_PHONE_STATE check only applies to mute (isMuteAdjust=true). Non-mute volume up/down on STREAM_VOICE_CALL only needs MODIFY_AUDIO_SETTINGS (normal level). Any foreground app can max/min call volume during active call. CAVEAT: HardeningEnforcer.blockVolumeMethod() may limit background apps (flag-gated by autoPublicVolumeApiHardening). CORRECTION: setMicrophoneMute() is FALSE POSITIVE — MODIFY_AUDIO_SETTINGS is the documented required permission per API contract.
